shell.footerFounder: You are receiving this because you have an active company on iCapOS.

question.heading: New investor question
question.body: {investor} has asked a new {category} question in your deal room “{room}”.
question.tip: Investors who get fast, thorough responses are significantly more likely to move to the next stage. Respond within 24 hours for best results.
question.subject: New investor question in "{room}"
question.text: {investor} asked a new {category} question in your deal room "{room}". View it here: {link}

document.heading: Document requested
document.body: {investor} has requested a document ({document}) in your deal room “{room}”.
document.tip: Uploading requested documents quickly signals preparedness and builds investor confidence.
document.subject: Document requested in "{room}"
document.text: {investor} requested "{document}" in deal room "{room}". View it here: {link}

viewed.heading: Investor viewed your deal room
viewed.body: {investor} opened your deal room “{room}” for the first time.
viewed.tip: Make sure all your documents are uploaded and any outstanding questions are answered — this is an active signal of investor interest.
viewed.subject: Investor viewed your deal room: "{room}"
viewed.text: {investor} viewed your deal room "{room}". Review it here: {link}

interest.heading: New investor interest
interest.body: {investor} has expressed interest in {company} on iCapOS.
interest.tip: This is an early signal. Log into your dashboard to review their profile and decide on next steps.
interest.subject: New investor interest in {company}
interest.text: {investor} expressed interest in {company}. View it here: {link}

teamInvite.heading: You’ve been invited to join {company}
teamInvite.body: {inviter} has invited you to join the {company} workspace on iCapOS as a team member.
teamInvite.body2: As a team member you can collaborate on investor outreach, review deal rooms, and track fundraising progress alongside your co-founder.
teamInvite.expiry: This invitation expires in 7 days. If you didn’t expect this email, you can safely ignore it.
teamInvite.subject: You're invited to join {company} on iCapOS
teamInvite.text: {inviter} invited you to join {company} on iCapOS. Accept here: {link}

dataRoom.leadComplete: You're close — {count} {docs} left for a full diligence package.
dataRoom.leadIncomplete: Your investor-access essentials aren't in yet. Until they are, your company can't be listed to investors or request introductions.
dataRoom.note: Several of these can be generated in-app in minutes — including your business plan, financial model, and cap table. {percent}% complete ({completed}/{total}).
dataRoom.subjectIncomplete: Action needed: complete your data room for {company}

diligence.founderReadyLine: The diligence report for {company} is ready for your review and response.
diligence.documentsRequestedLine: New documents have been requested for the {company} diligence.
diligence.releasedLine: The diligence package for {company} is now available.

marketing.title: Marketing Hub
marketing.descPre: Draft, edit, and store the marketing kit for
marketing.descPost: . SEO is applied to the public event page automatically.
marketing.aiNoteConfigured: Drafts SEO, brochure, email, and social from this event's real details. Review and Save to keep them.
marketing.aiNoteFallback: AI is not configured — Generate fills a template built from this event's details. Review and Save to keep them.
marketing.headline: Headline
marketing.subject: Subject
marketing.compliance: Educational community event — copy must not solicit securities or imply investment outcomes.

leads.title: Leads
leads.desc: Sponsor and service-provider prospects from registration. Move them along the pipeline — this never grants event access.
leads.noLeads: No leads in this view yet.

segments.empty: No segments yet. Add a few to drive the on-air strip.

manage.title: Title
manage.sectorHint: An event must have at least one track before it can be published.
manage.premiereHint: Premiere / start time (optional — recorded sessions unlock at this time)
manage.noCatalogPre: No sponsors in the catalog yet. Create sponsors in
manage.pasteLinkPh: Paste a live link — YouTube, Zoom, Meet, Whereby…
manage.videoHint: MP4 / WebM / MOV, up to 500 MB

control.dropHint: Awards everyone currently present in the chosen room.
control.livePrompt: Paste a live link (YouTube, Zoom, Meet, Whereby…), or leave blank if Whereby is set up:
control.announceBody: The session is live now — join the auditorium.
control.pollNeed: Add a question and at least 2 options

moderators.title: Event moderators
moderators.desc: Scope a staff member to specific rooms for this event. They can only control their assigned rooms in the live Control Center.
moderators.viewOnly: Only super admins can assign moderators. You can view current assignments.

banner.title: Event banner
banner.desc: Upload a cover image for the event hero. The overlay keeps the title readable; the focal point controls cropping.
banner.dropPrompt: Drag & drop an image, or click to upload
banner.fileHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP · 1600×600 recommended · up to 5 MB

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.descPost: and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

manage.title: User management
manage.desc: View, search, and manage all platform users. Change roles or deactivate accounts instantly.
manage.footnote: Role changes take effect immediately on the user's next page load. Deactivating an admin revokes their access instantly.
manage.deleteBodyMid: removes their account and everything they own. Consider
manage.deleteBodyPost: instead — it revokes access immediately and is fully reversible.
manage.noOwned: No owned records — only the account itself will be removed.

permissions.title: User Permissions
permissions.desc: Assign internal levels and fine-grained permissions for iCapOS staff. Changes are audited and enforced immediately.
permissions.inviteNote: An invitation email will be sent. The user will set their password and be redirected to the admin dashboard.
permissions.permsUpdated: Permissions updated. Changes take effect immediately.
permissions.inviteSent: Invite sent to {email}. They will receive an email to set up their account.
permissions.permOverridesDesc: Inherit role defaults, or explicitly grant/revoke permissions.
permissions.noPerms: No permissions — user cannot access protected admin tools.
permissions.cannotEdit: You cannot edit this user's permissions — they are at or above your internal level.
permissions.selectUser: Select an internal user to manage permissions.

partnerScores.title: Partner Scores
partnerScores.desc: Admin-only Phase 1 view to validate the Partner Score against real data before any investor- or founder-facing surface. Scores are computed live from on-platform activity.

page.title: Compliance & risk review
page.desc: Internal institutional controls for readiness risk, outreach compliance, messaging flags, and platform activity. Not legal advice.
page.recorded: {count} event(s) recorded this session · staff-only internal notes
page.auditNote: Staff-only internal notes · audit trail in compliance_events

workspace.releaseConfirm: Release this engagement to investors? This is final.
workspace.notified: {count, plural, one {# investor notified.} other {# investors notified.}}
workspace.aiModalDesc: Paste the company business summary. Claude drafts domains, findings, and claims for you to edit — nothing is published automatically.
workspace.aiPlaceholder: Paste the business summary, deck notes, or memo text…
workspace.sendModalDesc: The founder must already have a iCapOS account. Set what they (and investors, on release) can see — this is deliberate, never silent.
workspace.linkedFounder: Linked founder from the company record — leave as-is to send.
workspace.consentModalDesc: Freezes the current report as a version and sends it to the founder to sign via the in-platform e-signature. On signing, the version seals and the engagement locks.
workspace.noRequests: No document requests yet. Generate them from open findings, or add one.
workspace.noMembers: No founder or investor members yet.
workspace.investorNote: Investors must have an investor account; they see the released cut only.

index.title: E-signatures
index.desc: Upload a PDF, place fields, and send it for signature. (Word? Save it as PDF first.)
index.none: No documents yet. Upload a PDF or Word file to get started.

send.signerCompanyHint: Auto-fills every Company field on the document, read-only to the signer.

prepare.dropHint: Click a page to drop a {tool} field
prepare.autofillCompany: Auto-fills from the recipient's company (read-only to signer)
prepare.voidConfirm: Void this envelope? The signer will no longer be able to sign it.
